NAIL_SERVICES.label: Quick & Polished
NAIL_SERVICES.name: Express Manicure
NAIL_SERVICES.desc: A swift, efficient manicure with file and shape, cuticle tidy, and gel polish application. Perfect for a refresh.

NAIL_SERVICES.label: The Everyday Essential
NAIL_SERVICES.name: Classic Manicure
NAIL_SERVICES.desc: Thorough nail prep, cuticle care, hand massage, and full gel polish application. Our most loved everyday service.

NAIL_SERVICES.label: Built for Weak Nails
NAIL_SERVICES.name: Structured Classic Manicure
NAIL_SERVICES.desc: Perfect choice for people with weak nails and minimal growth. Includes gel polish, cuticle care, nail prep, and strengthening overlay.

NAIL_SERVICES.label: Full Sculpted Extensions
NAIL_SERVICES.name: Après Gel X Extensions
NAIL_SERVICES.desc: Premium soft gel extension system applied over natural nails. Zero damage, instant length, and a flawless finish.

NAIL_ART.name: Tier 1 — Simple
NAIL_ART.sub: Solid colour accents, minimal line art, single-nail detail.

NAIL_ART.name: Tier 2 — Layered
NAIL_ART.sub: Ombré, chrome, florals, geometric patterns, foils.

NAIL_ART.name: Tier 3 — Intricate
NAIL_ART.sub: 3D elements, mosaic nails, character art, bespoke hand-painted.
